events.description: segment opens, 'Under The Hood' title fades in on dark background
VS Code icon scales in with spring animation
extension puzzle piece badge pops in on VS Code icon
Install button click with expanding pulse ring
glowing data pulse dot travels from VS Code to Node.js
Node.js process bubble spawns with spring scale-in
red warning badge appears: 'ALMOST NO SANDBOXING' with shield slash icon
scene crossfades from spawn view to threat vectors view
file access threat icon slides in from left with red glow
shell commands threat icon slides up with amber glow
network requests threat icon slides in from right with purple glow
fake permission dialog mockup appears — then gets crossed out with red strikethrough
scene transitions to final full access reveal
4 access type badges (File System, Shell, Network, Data) pop in staggered
large FULL ACCESS stamp scales in with dramatic glow, lock-open icon
segment ending, elements remain on screen
